reviews.review_description: Very fun and interesting. BUT OH MY GOD WHY IS LEVEL THREE SO HARD!? I did beat it and get to level 9 but like come on. The dialogue even says “if we would have know it was a big raid we would have sent a bigger army” like the developer knows! And this isn’t an easy bow shooting td game this is lose 5 times and finally try really hard and lose at the last round and repeat. This is fun but you have to FOCUS EVERY SECOND. Would not buy unless your a really try hard and a td lover. 8/10
Great combination of strategi and action.
Loved the game at first but lately the game closes the second I open it. Really sad that I can't play it.

developer_response.body: It's great to hear you've loved the game, and we're truly sorry for the crash issues you're experiencing. We'll investigate this and aim to resolve it swiftly. Thank you for your patience and support!

reviews.review_description: Please let me use separate buttons to draw the bow and buy/sell towers.

I really enjoy the game's vibes. The time spent on the zeppeliner during battles, just taking in the gorgeous scenery, is a real treat. The mix of active player combat and tower defense is a lot of fun, especially when played in VR.

This is game is very well designed and I live the use of a bow both to teleport and shoot, as well as the ability to upgrade weapons outside of the levels. My main issue, however, is simply that I haven't yet been able to pass level 3 as it is incredibly difficult, but playing is still a great experience. I think that more towers or upgrades to the towers besides the explosives would also be great, but given the extremely cheap price, the game has quite a lot of content
